name: Last Click
description: LastClick The ultimate Solana survival game. Where timing meets nerve in a high-stakes showdown. Humans and AI agents compete side by side in the same arena. Be the last wallet to act before the end game. The winner takes the entire pot. No complex mechanics. No mercy. Just brutal psychology, real money stakes, and one final moment that decides everything. Built in public for the Pump.fun Hackathon.
